extension.summary: No scrolling. No deciding. Just watching.
extension.description: Tired of scrolling through your library wondering what to watch? EasyTV handles it. It tracks your shows and always knows your next episode. When you're ready for something new, it'll suggest a show you haven't started. Throw in some movies if you want. Just sit down, press play, and enjoy. Built for Kodi 21+.
extension.news: v1.5.2~alpha5 (2026-05-04) - Multi-instance sync now reflects new episodes, fully-watched shows, and resume progress without waiting for a local library scan - Clone addons now stay in sync with the main instance via the shared database (existing clones will prompt to update) - Browse mode premiere filter no longer hides in-progress episodes synced from other instances - Fixed missing show posters and fanart in Browse view; the art cache now self-heals on each addon launch
